item.title: Cloud Transit Solutions
item.description: Native Solutions CSP Transit Solution Limitations AWS AWS Transit Gateway Lack of visibilityNo peering within regionNo security controlsLimited BGP support Azure Via ExpressRoute Edge Router Lack of visibilityLack of controlNoisy neighbours Azure Azure Firewall Lack of visibilityRequires NAT and load balancer Azure Virtual WAN Lack of visibilityLack of controlLimited to 200 BGP routes to on-premCost GCP None No native transit solutionsSingle global VPC OCI Limited No native east-west and north-south transit solutionPromotes third party appliances Third-Party Solutions Legacy hardware vendors (e.

item.title: Aviatrix
item.description: Overview Multi-account, multi-region, multi-cloud networking AWS , GCP , Azure , OCI HA—active-active End-to-end encryption—high performance, line speed encryption Multi-cloud repeatable architecture Multi-cloud network segmentation e.

item.title: Aviatrix Multi-Cloud Network Architecture (MCNA)
item.description: Overview Avoid vendor lock-in 75-90% of enterprises—hybrid/multi-cloud Reference Architecture Application Layer Application residence VPCs/VNets, VMs, Kubernetes etc.

item.title: Aviatrix Certified Engineer Associate
item.description: Exam Content As-A-Service Models AWS Networking AWS Organization Hierarchy AWS VPCs Azure Networking Azure Resource Hierarchy Azure Virtual Networks (VNets) Azure Virtual Network Gateways Azure Transit Options GCP Networking GCP VPCs GCP Cloud Interconnect Oracle Cloud Infrastructure OCI Resource Hierarchy OCI Virtual Cloud Networks (VCNs) Aviatrix Aviatrix features Aviatrix Multi-Cloud Network Architecture (MCNA) Cloud Transit Solutions
